title: Brent Hendry
compiled_truth: Brent Hendry is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-03 to 2002-02-05), Brent Hendry sent 209 and received 2090 emails, totalling 2299 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (63), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (57), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (35), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (25), [Stephanie Panus](people/stephanie-panus) (23).
